description: User navigates from the 'Short description' step to the 'Additional Instructions' step within the booking setup.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the description input fields to a page titled 'Additional Instructions'.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the Contacts page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned directly over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the Contacts list.

description: The page navigates from the Contacts section to the Legal & Privacy section.
frame_description: The UI changes from the contact list to the Legal & Privacy selection screen.

description: The user navigates from the Legal & Privacy section to the Calendar view for session times.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the legal agreement options to a calendar interface.

description: Available time slots appear on the right side of the calendar interface, likely triggered by the selection of a date.
frame_description: The calendar shows February 25th selected, and in the subsequent frame, specific time slots (9 AM, 10 AM, 11 AM) become visible.
